---
id: create-study-guide
title: "Create a study guide for a course"
description: "Creates a new study guide. Any authenticated user can create a"
sidebar_label: "Create a study guide for a course"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/askatlas-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a study guide for a course"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/courses/{course_id}/study-guides"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new study guide. Any authenticated user can create a
guide for any course. The `creator_id` is taken from the JWT;
any value supplied in the request body is ignored.

Tags are normalized server-side: each value is trimmed +
lowercased + deduplicated (case-insensitively). Empty tags
after trim are rejected with 400. Validation order on tags:
per-tag length cap first (50 chars), total count cap second
(20 tags), then normalize.

Returns the full StudyGuideDetail shape on 201 -- empty
recommended_by/quizzes/resources/files arrays, vote_score=0,
view_count=0, user_vote=null, is_recommended=false. The
frontend can render the freshly-created guide without a
follow-up GET.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"course_id","in":"path","description":"The unique UUID of the parent course","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","description":"Request body for POST /api/courses/{course_id}/study-guides.\nOnly `title` is required. Tags are normalized server-side\n(trim + lowercase + dedupe); empty tags after trim are\nrejected with 400. `creator_id` is set from the JWT and\nignored if supplied here.\n","properties":{"title":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"maxLength":500},"description":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"maxLength":2000},"content":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"maxLength":100000},"tags":{"type":"array","maxItems":20,"items":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"maxLength":50}}},"required":["title"],"title":"CreateStudyGuideRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"201":{"description":"The freshly-created study guide","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","description":"Full study-guide payload for the detail endpoint. Includes\ncontent (excluded from the list payload) plus the\nauthenticated user's own vote state and the nested\nrecommenders / quizzes / resources / files arrays.\n","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"title":{"type":"string"},"description":{"type":"string","nullable":true},"content":{"type":"string","nullable":true},"tags":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"creator":{"type":"object","description":"Compact user payload used as the `creator` of a study guide. Same\nprivacy floor as SectionMemberResponse -- no email, no clerk_id.\n","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"first_name":{"type":"string"},"last_name":{"type":"string"}},"required":["id","first_name","last_name"],"title":"CreatorSummary"},"course":{"type":"object","description":"Compact course payload embedded in StudyGuideDetailResponse.\nMirrors EnrollmentCourseSummary but lives here separately so\nthe two surfaces can evolve independently.\n","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"department":{"type":"string"},"number":{"type":"string"},"title":{"type":"string"}},"required":["id","department","number","title"],"title":"GuideCourseSummary"},"vote_score":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"},"user_vote":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"enum":["up","down"]},"view_count":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","minimum":0},"is_recommended":{"type":"boolean"},"recommended_by":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","description":"Compact user payload used as the `creator` of a study guide. Same\nprivacy floor as SectionMemberResponse -- no email, no clerk_id.\n","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"first_name":{"type":"string"},"last_name":{"type":"string"}},"required":["id","first_name","last_name"],"title":"CreatorSummary"}},"quizzes":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","description":"Compact quiz payload embedded in StudyGuideDetailResponse.\nPrivacy floor: id + title + question_count only. Creator id,\nquiz content, and scoring config are intentionally absent --\nthe quiz detail endpoint (future ticket ASK-142) is the source\nof truth for those.\n","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"title":{"type":"string"},"question_count":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","minimum":0}},"required":["id","title","question_count"],"title":"QuizSummary"}},"resources":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","description":"Compact resource payload embedded in StudyGuideDetailResponse.\nNo creator or uploader info -- the study-guide detail caller\ndoes not need to know who attached the resource.\n","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"title":{"type":"string"},"url":{"type":"string"},"type":{"type":"string","enum":["link","video","article","pdf"]},"description":{"type":"string","nullable":true},"created_at":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}},"required":["id","title","url","type","created_at"],"title":"ResourceSummary"}},"files":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","description":"Compact file payload embedded in StudyGuideDetailResponse.\nPrivacy floor: id + name + mime_type + size only. Owner,\ns3_key, and checksum are intentionally absent.\n","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"name":{"type":"string"},"mime_type":{"type":"string"},"size":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","minimum":0}},"required":["id","name","mime_type","size"],"title":"StudyGuideFileSummary"}},"created_at":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"},"updated_at":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}},"required":["id","title","tags","creator","course","vote_score","user_vote","view_count","is_recommended","recommended_by","quizzes","resources","files","created_at","updated_at"],"title":"StudyGuideDetailResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad request","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","description":"Standardized error response structure matching application error domains","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer"},"status":{"type":"string"},"message":{"type":"string"},"details":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["code","status","message"],"title":"AppError"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","description":"Standardized error response structure matching application error domains","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer"},"status":{"type":"string"},"message":{"type":"string"},"details":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["code","status","message"],"title":"AppError"}}}},"404":{"description":"Not found","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","description":"Standardized error response structure matching application error domains","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer"},"status":{"type":"string"},"message":{"type":"string"},"details":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["code","status","message"],"title":"AppError"}}}},"500":{"description":"Internal server error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","description":"Standardized error response structure matching application error domains","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer"},"status":{"type":"string"},"message":{"type":"string"},"details":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["code","status","message"],"title":"AppError"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
